name: trenches
description: Safety-first Solana trenches bot with low-cap, fee, wallet-tracker, dip-entry, and guarded execution gates.

scripts.forward-test: TRENCHES_SOURCE=mock TRENCHES_BANKROLL_USD=500 TRENCHES_FORWARD_TEST_CYCLES=2 TRENCHES_SCAN_INTERVAL_MS=100 TRENCHES_PAPER_STATE_FILE=.trenches-forward-smoke.json node src/index.js forward-test
scripts.gmgn:validate: TRENCHES_SOURCE=gmgn TRENCHES_TRACKER_SOURCE=gmgn-smartmoney TRENCHES_USE_RUGCHECK=false TRENCHES_OUTPUT_LIMIT=5 node src/index.js scan
scripts.check: node --check src/backtest.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/dataSources.js && node --check src/executor.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/paper.js && node --check src/risk.js && node --check src/strategy.js && node --test
